creator: mwest@uct.ac.za
text:
On Wed, Mar 14, 2001 at 11:38:27PM +1100, chris@aims.com.au wrote:
> I've updated the base port to add the latest unified patch

I'm currently using Chris' updated shar of the port, and it seems to
be working well.  It would be great if this could be put into the
ports tree for 4.3-RELEASE.

Also:

On Thu, Mar 15, 2001 at 11:00:39AM +0100, Achim Patzner wrote:
> Maybe someone should add a warning about not running it as root as
> it is doing something incomprehensible to the password database if
> it is left alone and able to access it.

Has anyone else noticed this?  I've not been able to reproduce the
problem yet.

-- 
mwest@uct.ac.za
